import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        let v = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
        has = false
        cur = 0
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
    else if b == 43
      neg = false
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    let v = if neg
      -cur
    else
      cur
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  mut inserted = false
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(y)
      y
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn insertion_sort(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let x = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = insert_sorted(result, x)
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn print_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Unit
  mut out = ""
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(y)
      y
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let nums = parse_line(line)
  let sorted = insertion_sort(nums)
  print_list(sorted)
when None
  println("")
end
